7. shriek (verb): "Shrieking is a loud scream." Or "Shrieking is a high-pitched sound." Use: "Shrieking is a loud vocalization." Similar to shout but higher pitch. Simpler: "Shrieking is a scream." 9. shrink (verb): "Shrinking is getting smaller." Or "Shrinking is a reduction in size." Use: "Shrinking is a process of becoming smaller." German: "Schrumpfen ist ein Prozess des Kleinerwerdens." Japanese: "縮むことは小さくなる過程だ。" Chinese: "收缩是变小的过程。" Simpler: "Shrinking is a decrease in size." German: "Schrumpfen ist eine Größenabnahme." Japanese: "縮むことはサイズの減少だ。" Chinese: "收缩是尺寸减小。" Good.

10. shrug (verb): "Shrugging is a gesture of the shoulders." Use: "Shrugging is a shoulder movement." German: "Achselzucken ist eine Schulterbewegung." Japanese: "肩をすくめることは肩の動きだ。" Chinese: "耸肩是一种肩部动作。" Good.
